---
title: "Height Data Summary"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
height_data <- read_csv("height_data_clean.csv")

height_data %>%
  filter(survey_date == "2023-01-27") %>%
  group_by(pop) %>%
  summarise(avg_height_cm = mean(height_cm, na.rm = TRUE))
```
